patch.value: As an agile/ops/research team, I want pm init --type-preset, so that my domain's item types are registered instantly without manual add-type calls
As an agile/ops/research team, I want pm init --type-preset, so that my domain's item types are registered instantly without manual add-type calls
pm init --type-preset agile|ops|research idempotently registers the preset types; composes with --preset/--defaults; no-preset behavior unchanged

Story satisfied: pm init --type-preset agile|ops|research shipped via pm-1lkm (idempotent preset registration, composes with --preset/--defaults, InitResult summary). Verified init --yes --type-preset agile in temp dir. Closing the story-level tracking as part of the schema-customization-completion PR.
Delivered by pm-1lkm (pm init --type-preset agile|ops|research with persisted runtime schema registration + InitResult summary).
Fresh projects bootstrap agile/ops/research item types idempotently during init, composing with --preset/--defaults.
init --yes --type-preset agile registered the preset types in this PR's smoke run; no-preset behavior unchanged.
